title: Microglossa pyrifolia
taxonomy: Microglossa pyrifolia belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is a species within the genus Microglossa. The classification of Microglossa pyrifolia is further detailed as being a part of the tribe Inuleae. This classification is based on its morphological characteristics and phylogenetic relationships. The plant's classification is an important aspect of understanding its evolutionary history and position within the plant kingdom.

intro: Microglossa pyrifolia, also known as bitter leaf tree, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, known for its bitter-tasting leaves. The health benefits of Microglossa pyrifolia include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion.
